productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Striped Grey T-shirt
description: Composition Grey polo t-shirt with red,blue and white stripes, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed collar with a buttoned chest placket, embroidered and appliquéd branding on the left chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Tumble dry low Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Project your love for the game with this stylish t-shirt from US Polo. The classic styling on this tee makes it perfect for casual and semi-formal occasions. Pair this with straight fit denims and canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
